title: coelogyne pumila
intro: Coelogyne pumila, also known as the dwarf Coelogyne, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Coelogyne genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Coelogyne pumila include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Coelogyne pumila is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
